.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
Reformatted the DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL string concatenation to a single line for readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "..." + WRAPPER_VERSION + "...";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH string constant to a single line.
Reformatted the MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH string constant to a single line.
Added space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' keyword in null check to comply with standard code style.
Added space after 'if' and '!' keywords in directory existence check to comply with standard code style.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Remove the deprecated @EnableZuulProxy annotation as Zuul 1 is no longer supported in modern Spring Cloud Gateway setups.
Refactor multi-line string concatenation in log statements to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Introduce CRLFLogConverter marker to log statements to prevent CRLF injection vulnerabilities in log outputs.
Update active profile retrieval logic to fallback to default profiles if no active profiles are set, ensuring consistent logging behavior.
Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Replace JPA repository and auditing annotations with R2DBC equivalents to switch from synchronous to reactive database access.
Add custom converters to handle UUID serialization to/from String for R2DBC compatibility.
Add custom converters to handle Instant serialization to/from LocalDateTime for R2DBC compatibility.
Add custom converters to handle Duration serialization to/from Long for R2DBC compatibility.
Add custom converters to handle ZonedDateTime serialization to/from LocalDateTime for R2DBC compatibility.
Add custom converter to handle BitSet reading as Boolean for R2DBC compatibility.
Register the custom type converters with the R2DBC infrastructure.
Define a bean to resolve the R2DBC dialect based on the connection factory.
Define a bean for mapping updates in R2DBC repositories.
Define a bean for rendering SQL queries in R2DBC.
Replace the servlet-based WebMvcConfigurer with the reactive WebFluxConfigurer to align with a Spring WebFlux stack.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: import org.springframework.web.reactive.config.WebFluxConfigurer; public class DateTimeFormatConfiguration implements WebFluxConfigurer

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the explicit registration of the Hibernate5Module bean for Jackson.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the explicit registration of the ProblemModule bean for Jackson.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of ProblemModule and the problemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the explicit registration of the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean for Jackson.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of ConstraintViolationProblemModule and the constraintViolationProblemModule() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor Liquibase bean configuration to use a custom AsyncSpringLiquibase and manual DataSource creation instead of Spring Boot auto-configuration providers.
Update the Liquibase bean configuration to use the new setLabelFilter API instead of the deprecated setLabels method.
Add a helper method to manually construct a DataSource for Liquibase using R2dbcProperties and LiquibaseProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: private static DataSource createLiquibaseDataSource(...) { return DataSourceBuilder.create()...build(); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace Spring MVC WebMvcConfigurer and LocaleResolver with WebFlux WebFilter and LocaleContextResolver to support reactive stack.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: implements WebMvcConfigurer -> implements LocaleContextResolver; LocaleResolver -> WebFilter

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to use jakarta.annotation and Spring WebFlux specific classes instead of javax and Spring MVC classes.
Implement a custom AngularCookieLocaleContextResolver to handle locale resolution in a reactive manner using ServerWebExchange.
Implement a WebFilter to intercept requests and change locale based on query parameters in a reactive flow.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public WebFilter localeChangeFilter(LocaleContextResolver localeContextResolver) { return (exchange, chain) -> { ... }; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace Spring Security MVC configuration (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter) with WebFlux reactive configuration (SecurityWebFilterChain) to align with the reactive stack.
Switch from synchronous method security annotation to the reactive equivalent required for WebFlux applications.
Define a ReactiveAuthenticationManager bean using UserDetailsRepositoryReactiveAuthenticationManager instead of relying on the default MVC authentication flow.
Rewrite HTTP security rules using ServerHttpSecurity DSL, replacing antMatchers with pathMatchers and disabling CSRF in the reactive style.
Replace WebSecurity.ignoring() with ServerHttpSecurity.securityMatcher() using NegatedServerWebExchangeMatcher to exclude static resources from security filters.
Update header configuration to use reactive header writers (ReferrerPolicyServerHttpHeadersWriter) and lambda-based DSL.
Remove the custom JWTConfigurer adapter and replace it with a SpaWebFilter, likely shifting JWT handling to a different layer or filter chain in the reactive setup.
Remove the integration of SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling, as the reactive security chain handles errors differently or this is deferred.
Remove the explicit CorsFilter injection and configuration from the security chain, likely moving CORS configuration to a separate WebFlux CORS registry.
Clean up imports by removing unused MVC-specific classes and adding necessary WebFlux and reactive security classes.
